title: gmelina hollrungii
intro: Gmelina hollrungii, also known as Gmelina philippensis, is a medicinal plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Verbenaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its health benefits. The leaves and bark of Gmelina hollrungii have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
